skill.name: ai-product
skill.description: Guides teams through production AI product design, including LLM integration, structured outputs, prompt testing, streaming UX, safety checks, and cost control.
skill.summary: Build production-ready AI product features with validation, testing, safety, and cost discipline.
skill.author: sickn33

security_audit.summary: The static analyzer flagged SKILL.md:3 for a weak cryptographic algorithm, but that line is only a frontmatter description. No evidence found of cryptographic code, scripts, network access, filesystem access, external commands, or prompt injection attempts.

content.value_statement: AI features often fail when teams ship demos without production discipline. This skill helps Claude, Codex, and Claude Code plan reliable LLM systems with validation, testing, user trust, and cost controls.
actual_capabilities: Recommends structured output patterns with schema validation.
Guides streaming response design to improve perceived latency.
Encourages prompt versioning and regression testing.
Identifies common production risks for LLM features.
Frames AI product decisions around safety, reliability, and cost.
limitations: Does not provide runnable source code or implementation scripts.
Does not include provider-specific API examples.
Does not replace security, privacy, or legal review.
Requires the user to supply product context and constraints.

use_cases.title: Plan a new AI feature
use_cases.description: Define the architecture, validation strategy, and user experience before implementation starts.

use_cases.title: Harden an LLM workflow
use_cases.description: Review output validation, prompt testing, fallback behavior, and cost controls for an existing feature.

use_cases.title: Improve AI user trust
use_cases.description: Design streaming, citations, uncertainty handling, and failure states that make AI behavior clearer.

prompt_templates.title: Review an AI feature idea
prompt_templates.scenario: Beginner planning for a new feature.
prompt_templates.prompt: Use the ai-product skill to review this AI feature idea. Identify the core user value, the LLM role, key risks, and a simple production plan.

prompt_templates.title: Design structured outputs
prompt_templates.scenario: Intermediate planning for reliable LLM responses.
prompt_templates.prompt: Use the ai-product skill to design structured output handling for this workflow. Include validation rules, failure handling, and test cases.

prompt_templates.title: Audit production readiness
prompt_templates.prompt: Use the ai-product skill to audit this AI feature for production readiness. Cover prompts, RAG context, safety checks, UX states, observability, and costs.

prompt_templates.title: Optimize an AI product system
prompt_templates.scenario: Advanced improvement for an existing AI product.
prompt_templates.prompt: Use the ai-product skill to improve this AI product architecture. Reduce latency and cost while preserving answer quality, safety, and user trust.

output_examples.input: Review a support agent that writes refund replies.
output_examples.output: A readiness review covering structured reply fields, policy retrieval, approval gates, hallucination checks, and fallback behavior.

output_examples.input: Plan streaming for a document analysis feature.
output_examples.output: A UX plan with progress states, partial results, cancellation behavior, error states, and validation before final display.

output_examples.input: Reduce LLM cost for a chat assistant.
output_examples.output: A cost plan covering token budgets, retrieval limits, model selection, caching, monitoring, and regression tests.

best_practices: Treat prompts as versioned product logic and test them before release.
Validate every structured output before showing or storing it.
Measure cost, latency, failure rates, and user trust signals.
anti_patterns: Shipping a demo workflow without failure handling.
Stuffing irrelevant content into the context window.
Parsing free-form LLM text when structured output is required.

faq.question: What does this skill help with?
faq.answer: It helps plan and review AI product features for reliability, usability, safety, and cost control.

faq.question: Does it write production code?
faq.answer: No. It provides product and architecture guidance, not runnable implementation code.

faq.question: Can it help with RAG systems?
faq.answer: Yes. The skill covers RAG architecture at a planning and review level.

faq.question: Is it useful before launch?
faq.answer: Yes. It is well suited for readiness reviews and risk checks before release.

faq.question: Does it replace model safety testing?
faq.answer: No. It recommends safety practices, but teams still need dedicated testing and review.

faq.question: Which tools can use it?
faq.answer: The report lists support for Claude, Codex, and Claude Code.
